subject: docs: fix stale counts and clarify style guide palette scope
body:

- Export format count: 42→40 in README, USER_GUIDE, TESTING_GUIDE, CLAUDE.md

- USER_GUIDE: add missing Zoom Background to format list
- STYLE_GUIDE: clarify UI chrome palette vs 19 content themes
- SESSION_NOTES: rewrite with current session context
